steps.title: Square the linear conversion factor
steps.content:
When converting areas between units, we must square the linear conversion factor. Since $1\text{ nautical mile} = 1.852\text{ km}$:
$$(1.852)^2 = 3.429904$$

steps.title: Apply the conversion factor to the given area
steps.content:
Multiply the 52 square nautical miles by this conversion factor:
$$k = 52 \times 3.429904 = 178.355008$$
Rounded to the nearest tenth: $k = 178.4$
